professionals.name: Dr. Fülöp Sarolta Réka
professionals.bio: From 2024-09-30 until expected 2025-01-31, she sees patients in a consulting room accessible from the main entrance of Orosházi Dr. László Elek Hospital and Polyclinic, 5900 Orosháza, Könd utca 59. The page lists office hours plus preventive consultation and counseling times.
